samples.location: I290 Expy W / S Austin Blvd

method: Dashboard-only incidents (NIBRS-coded, no narrative) bucketed by primary_offense_type. Zone lift = (category's share of the zone) / (zone's share of the zoned+typed corpus). Lift suppressed when the cell has < 3 records. Source backlink: https://opendata.oak-park.us/CrimeIncident (canonical OP open-data dashboard).
